notes: Makes the DOT log graph duty-status trace about 10% thicker for cleaner paper-log readability.
Makes vertical grid lines about 40% thinner/lighter while keeping hour lines slightly stronger than quarter-hour lines.
Removes read-only short-event dots and warning/exclamation circles from the graph; short events render as minimum blue trace segments.
Keeps edit handles visible only while actively editing, with smaller cleaner handle visuals.
UI/rendering-only patch; no duty events, driving events, HOS logic, route/load metadata, signing, backup/import, GPS, or Drive Mode behavior changed.
label: v95.83 Graph line weight and grid readability
